{% from "macros.html" import render_post, render_tag %} {# E501: wrong-call-args — render_post requires 'post', called with no args #} {{ render_post() }} {# E501: wrong-call-args — render_tag requires 'tag', called with too many positional args #} {{ render_tag("python", "extra") }} {# E601: template-does-not-exist — nonexistent.html does not exist #} {% include "nonexistent.html" %} {# include with ignore missing must NOT trigger E601 #} {% include "also_missing.html" ignore missing %}
